_comment: Single source of truth for the candidate's CV and cover letter.
Edit this file with your details; tailor.py will read it and generate
tailored CV/cover letters in LaTeX. See profile.example.json for the

core_competencies.label: Frontend Engineering (React/Next.js)
core_competencies.body: React 18/19, Next.js 15/16, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, Zustand, TanStack Query -- building component-driven, accessible, multilingual interfaces for SaaS dashboards.

core_competencies.label: AI Integration & Applied ML
core_competencies.body: Google Gemini API, HuggingFace Transformers, VAPI Voice AI, Label Studio -- embedding LLM-driven features, voice agents, and NLP pipelines into production web apps.

core_competencies.label: SaaS & CRM Domain
core_competencies.body: Built multilingual admin/staff CRM dashboards (NedSwiss), real-time dashboards, and 3D visualization tools -- all under tight product/UX constraints for cross-regional operations.

core_competencies.label: Backend-Adjacent (Python/Node)
core_competencies.body: Python, FastAPI, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, Docker -- supporting full-stack feature delivery and data-pipeline work.

core_competencies.label: Arabic Language & Localization
core_competencies.body: Native Arabic; experience with Arabic NLP keyword extraction, RTL interfaces, and Arabic-first AI products (Turjuman).

core_competencies.label: Remote Collaboration & Quality
core_competencies.body: Git, feature-driven architecture, code review, Agile/Scrum -- daily collaboration with multicultural, cross-functional teams in European and MENA corporate environments.

experience.title: Front-End Developer
bullets: Build and maintain web application features for cross-regional European operations, including an Arabic NLP keyword-extraction interface integrated with RICOH's enterprise document pipeline.

Delivered multiple production frontend projects under the CORELIA umbrella: real-time tailgating anomaly detection with live MJPEG streaming, multi-mode 3D building viewer, invoice lifecycle management, and the Arabic NLP tooling above.
Ship modular, reusable component systems with Shadcn UI, Radix UI, and Tailwind CSS, establishing patterns adopted across the CORELIA project portfolio.
Collaborate daily with multicultural, cross-functional teams in a remote-friendly European corporate environment; communicate technical decisions clearly across disciplines.

experience.title: Front-End Developer
bullets: Built a multilingual admin/staff CRM dashboard with rich data tables, chart analytics, and role-based navigation -- a near-direct analog to contact-center operations interfaces.
Developed a high-performance marketing website with advanced scroll animations (GSAP, Lenis) and micro-interactions, achieving smooth 60fps across devices.
Implemented internationalization (next-intl), Zod-validated contact forms, and optimized bundle performance with Turbopack.

experience.title: Frontend Leader
bullets: Led the frontend track for Google Developer Student Club, running workshops and hands-on sessions for 50+ students.
Mentored developers in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and modern UI architecture patterns, reinforcing component-driven thinking and code review practices.

publications: Maintainer -- Turjuman: open-source AI-powered Arabic document translation platform.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

awards: **Finalist / Winner** -- WE Innovative Hackathon (2026) for CyrusLearn Interactive Learning Platform.
